items.title: UTT: Manav Thakkar reflects on UP Prometheans’ disappointing debut campaign

items.title: Rangers buy Serbia's Dragojevic from Partizan
items.summary: Rangers sign 20-year-old Serbia midfielder Vanja Dragojevic from Partizan for an undisclosed fee.
